introSection: Taka Waka is a steel roller coaster located at Freizeit-Land Geiselwind in Geiselwind, Bavaria, Germany. It is situated in the Safari Land themed area.

sections.title: History
sections.content: A new attraction called Taka Waka was announced on 28 November 2021, however, no details were revealed at this time.

fullText:
Taka Waka is a steel roller coaster located at Freizeit-Land Geiselwind in Geiselwind, Bavaria, Germany. It is situated in the Safari Land themed area.

A new attraction called Taka Waka was announced on 28 November 2021, however, no details were revealed at this time.
